description: A vertical graphic on a light gray background. Blue and red text at the top reads Go home today. Below is a smartphone displaying a mock boarding pass headed CBP Home, MOBILE BOARDING PASS, with an airplane crossing a world map between the labels USA and HOME. A red band reads FREE FLIGHT + $2,600 EXIT BONUS, above a Department of Homeland Security seal and the address DHS.GOV/CBPHOME.
notable_text: Go home today.; CBP Home; MOBILE BOARDING PASS; USA; HOME; FREE FLIGHT + $2,600 EXIT BONUS; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
